title: Paper pvp
description: Im currently working on paper pvp witch is a pach for pvp but drawn by hand on paper, but its currently in beta so not all textures are drawn.try it on mcpvp.club for the best experience
body:
Paper PvP [BETA] – Hand-Drawn Combat
Welcome to Paper PvP, a unique Minecraft resource pack where every single texture started its life on a real sheet of paper. No digital shortcuts here—everything is hand-drawn with pens and pencils, then scanned and carefully integrated into the game to give you a raw, sketchy, and completely original aesthetic.
The Paper Feel
Tired of the same old pixel-perfect PvP packs? Paper PvP brings a fresh "notebook doodle" vibe to your world. It combines a clean layout for competitive gameplay with the charming imperfections of traditional art.
PvP Optimized
Even though it looks like it was drawn in a math class, it is built for fighting:
Clear Visibility: High-contrast outlines to spot your enemies easily.
Unique Weapons: Swords and bows that look like they have been sketched right out of a sketchbook.
Fast and Lightweight: Designed to keep your FPS high while looking stylish.
Current Beta Status
This pack is currently in BETA. Since every texture is drawn by hand, the project is still a work in progress (WIP).
Completed:most Core PvP items (Swords, Bows, netherite Armor icons, Golden Apples).
Coming Soon: Full block retextures.
Join the journey! Since this is a Beta, your feedback is incredibly valuable. If you have suggestions or find a drawing that needs fixing, let me know in the comments.
